name: PointCloud
summary: Initializes a new instance of the PointCloud class.

constructors.name: PointCloud
constructors.summary: Creates a new point cloud instance using the given parameters.

methods.name: Attach
methods.summary: Attach this point cloud to model. Can select only Potree type point clouds immediately after attach. Others need to be selected manually after attach has been completed. Use AttachComplete() to find out, if attach process has completed.

methods.name: AttachComplete
methods.summary: Checks if the point cloud attach is complete. Needed when attaching non-Potree point cloud file, which needs conversion.

methods.name: Detach
methods.summary: Detach this point cloud from model.

methods.name: GetPointClouds
methods.summary: Utility function: Gets available point clouds.

methods.name: GetVisibleInViews
methods.summary: Gets the views in which this point cloud is visible.

methods.name: Select
methods.summary: Select point cloud by Guid, by Name, by OriginalPath or by Url.

methods.name: SetVisibility
methods.summary: Set point cloud visibility in given views.

properties.name: BoundingBox
properties.summary: Gets or sets the bounding box.

properties.name: LocationBy
properties.summary: Gets or sets the location by value: Empty for model origin, base point guid for base point.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: Gets or sets the point clouds name. Abbreviated from the point cloud file name. Cannot be given by user.

properties.name: OffsetX
properties.summary: Gets or sets the offset X.

properties.name: OffsetY
properties.summary: Gets or sets the offset Y.

properties.name: OffsetZ
properties.summary: Gets or sets the offset Z.

properties.name: OriginalPath
properties.summary: Gets or sets the point clouds path (where it originally located).

properties.name: RotationZ
properties.summary: Gets or sets the rotation Z.

properties.name: Url
properties.summary: Gets or sets the point clouds URL without a file name.

properties.name: UseAutoCreatedBasePoint
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether an auto-created base point should be used. If set to true, LocationBy value is ignored.
